review_questions.question: Is RX.4 correctly scoped to A82, A83, A84, plus a market/welfare duplicate audit?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, keep RX.4 limited to elasticity representation candidates and duplicate-audit holds.

review_questions.question: Should A82 proceed as the lower-risk table elasticity candidate with needs A15, A61, and A66?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, authorize mutation review for A82 with source-value pairing emphasized.

review_questions.question: Should A84 proceed as the lower-risk source/revenue interpretation candidate with needs A15 and A67?
review_questions.recommended_answer: B. Mostly; preserve A15/A67 unless HCS wants an explicit conceptual prerequisite for elasticity-and-omzet before mutation.

review_questions.question: Is A83 ready as Elasticiteit berekenen uit vraaggrafiek, or should it be renamed/generalized or held?
review_questions.recommended_answer: B. Conditional: decide explicitly whether to approve the demand-graph name, generalize to P-Q graph elasticity, or hold until graph-source evidence is stronger.

review_questions.question: Do A82, A83, and A84 procedures preserve elasticity sign and absolute-value interpretation?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, require sign and absolute-value interpretation in every approved spec.

review_questions.question: Should market/welfare duplicate areas remain held because existing units already cover surplus, welfare, and intervention graph operations?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, keep new market/welfare units held unless a later focused review moves one into scope.

review_questions.question: Should all approved A82-A84 units remain generator-blocked and non-interactive until generator/projection support exists?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes, hard block student-facing use.

review_questions.question: If the gate passes, authorize later CLI-only mutation for A82 and A84, with A83 conditional on the naming/evidence decision?
review_questions.recommended_answer: A. Yes for A82/A84 after live checks; A83 only if the graph-source decision is explicit.

review_questions.question: What gate status should GATE-RX4-elasticity-market-diagram-review receive?

required_conditions_if_passes: Run live numbering check immediately before any later mutation.
Use only unit-add.js; no hand edits to references/machine.
Record the A83 naming/evidence decision in the gate closure and mutation log.
Keep market/welfare duplicate areas held unless explicitly re-approved.
Mark any newly approved A-domain units generator-blocked and non-interactive.
Do not hand-edit references/external, authored source files, or RAG chunks.
Do not authorize diagnostics, adaptive routing, student-facing AI, automatic sequencing, mastery decisions, summative use, or student-facing PV projection.
